name: Julie Andrews
abstract: Dame Julie Andrews (born Julia Elizabeth Wells, 1 October 1935) is an English actress, singer and author. Her accolades include an Academy Award, a British Academy Film Award, three Emmy Awards, three Grammy Awards, seven Golden Globe Awards and nominations for three Tony Awards.

about_quotes.speaker: Billy Taylor
about_quotes.evidence: Julie Andrews is mentioned only as a person who starred in the show My Fair Lady, which Billy Taylor recorded music for; no personal interaction or relationship is described.
about_quotes.doc_title: Billy Taylor — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Yusef Lateef
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...what did Julie Andrews say in The Sound of Music? ... [INTERVIEWEE] Well, my full name now is Yusef Abdul Lateef...

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: it started with a motif that I thought fitted the character that Julie Andrews played.
